description: CDIF Reference - a typed reference to an external entity. Combines the schema.org labeledLink surface with DDI-CDI dt-Reference semantics and an optional SKOS Concept describing the semantic role of the reference. See https://github.com/Cross-Domain-Interoperability-Framework/Discovery/issues/13 for the motivating use case (distinguishing assertions about a sample registration from assertions about the physical object).

allOf.description: Inherited from schemaorgProperties/labeledLink - a profile of schema.org/CreativeWork.

Reference.description: Based on DDI-CDI reference to an entity (dt-Reference).

cdif:semantic.description: Semantic role of this reference, expressed as a SKOS Concept (inline object or @id reference).

SkosConcept.description: SKOS Concept reference (resolved inline from skosProperties/skosConcept). A unit of thought within a concept scheme; here used to label the semantic role of a cdif:Reference.

skos:prefLabel.description: Preferred lexical label for this concept.

skos:inScheme.description: Concept scheme this concept belongs to.

skos:notation.description: Classification code for this concept within a scheme.

LanguageTaggedValue.description: An RDF literal value with a language tag, serialized as a JSON-LD value object.
